segments.integrated_caption: The video begins with a dark green screen displaying a golden dragon emblem and Chinese film license text, accompanied by a dramatic orchestral swell, a distinct 'ping' sound, and sustained tense music. This transitions to a dark blue background listing production companies, while the orchestral anticipation builds. A spotlight then reveals a silhouette of the '黑猫警长' (Black Cat Detective), identified by green text with his birth year and zodiac, as rapid electronic beeps and a metallic clang sound. The silhouette glows yellow, striking a heroic pose, as a 'pew-pew' laser sound and rapid gunshots are heard, followed by an explosion. The scene shifts to a vibrant outdoor setting where a brown mouse, wearing a yellow vest and blue helmet, runs frantically, emitting a high-pitched, panicked squeak. The Black Cat Detective, now fully animated in his black and white uniform with a red cape and cap, appears in a close-up with determined eyes. He issues a commanding shout in Chinese, '全副武装, 出发!' (Fully armed, depart!), as an upbeat, heroic orchestral theme begins. He is shown in dynamic action, leaping through the air with a gun drawn, then landing with a confident smirk, joined by two smaller, white-uniformed cat officers who stand ready. The heroic theme continues as the scene transitions to a night sky with stars, where the Black Cat Detective points upward with a serious expression, then clenches his fist in resolve. More 'pew-pew' laser sounds, gunshots, and an explosion punctuate the music. The final shot shows him in a close-up, eyes narrowed, holding a walkie-talkie, with Chinese credits for the scriptwriter and art designer appearing on screen, while a female voice begins singing in Chinese, accompanied by the continuing heroic orchestral theme.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with dynamic, heroic instrumental music and gunshots as the 黑猫警长, in a determined pose, leaps forward with a gun. The scene quickly shifts to a brown mouse, the 棕色老鼠, running frantically through a dark, blue-toned environment, suggesting a chase. The 黑猫警长 is then seen riding a blue motorcycle, accompanied by two 白制服小猫警员, as they pursue a group of yellow helicopters flying in formation, with more gunshots punctuating the action. The 黑猫警长 confidently points his gun, signaling command, while the 白制服小猫警员 look on with focused expressions. The scene transitions to a title card displaying '黑猫警长' in bold, metallic 3D text with a glowing effect, accompanied by the iconic theme song where a female vocalist sings, "Ah-ha ah-ha Black Cat Detective, Forest citizens salute you!" The song continues as the scene shifts to a nighttime forest setting where a large, sleeping creature lies under a tree, surrounded by glowing stars and a quiet village. The camera pans across the serene night landscape, highlighting a dark building with illuminated windows, possibly a police station or headquarters. The theme song then fades, replaced by a calm female narrator stating, "It's late at night. The forest is extremely quiet. Everyone is asleep. Huh? The lights in the granary, why are they still on?" The scene then shifts to a daytime setting where a group of small, red-and-blue-clad mice, the 小红蓝老鼠, are heard excitedly chattering and counting "two one two" as they stand in a line, being addressed by a larger, red-clad mole-like character with glasses, the 红衣鼹鼠领袖. The mole's distinct male voice instructs, "Children, look at mom," and then asks, "Hey, look, what is this?" to which the 小红蓝老鼠 enthusiastically respond, "Mouse! Yay!" The mole continues, "Children, you've grown up, mom...", indicating a moment of planning or instruction.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a daytime setting with the large, red-outfitted, glasses-wearing 红衣鼹鼠领袖 animatedly gesturing and speaking to two small 小红蓝老鼠. The 红衣鼹鼠领袖's calm, instructive female voice is heard, explaining, "Mommy brought you here today to teach you how to catch bugs." The 小红蓝老鼠 respond with excited, child-like voices, exclaiming, "Mommy, mommy, I caught it, I caught it!" and "Me too!", accompanied by sounds of struggling and catching. One mouse proudly declares, "Hey, look!" and another makes an "Humph!" sound, as sounds of movement continue. The scene then shifts to a dark, nighttime environment where the 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform with a red cape, and his two 白制服小猫警员 in white uniforms and blue helmets, approach a building. A distinct device sound is heard as the 黑猫警长 uses a gadget to unlock a door, which opens with a "whoosh" to reveal a glowing green interior. The video cuts back to daytime, showing one of the 小红蓝老鼠 climbing a large golden object. Its child-like voice excitedly points out, "Mommy, mommy, there are so many delicious things here!" The 红衣鼹鼠领袖's voice calmly identifies it as "Oh, that's flour," to which the mouse responds, "It smells so good!" The 红衣鼹鼠领袖 then gently instructs, "Be good, dears, this is food donated by forest citizens for the disaster area to get through winter, we can't just take it," and the mouse confirms, "I remember!" The scene returns to the nighttime setting, where the 黑猫警长 is now riding a futuristic motorcycle, its powerful engine starting up, revving, and accelerating with a distinct vehicle sound. A male voice, likely the 黑猫警长, exclaims, "Hehe, off we go!" as he chases a brown 棕色老鼠 in a yellow vest and blue helmet, who is fleeing through the dark forest. Sounds of the 棕色老鼠 scurrying frantically are heard. The chase intensifies with the motorcycle's loud engine roar as the 黑猫警长 leaps from his motorcycle, landing on a tree branch, while the 棕色老鼠 continues to run frantically, looking back in fear, its scurrying sounds continuing. The final frames show the 黑猫警长 silhouetted against a glowing blue background, leaping through the air with a determined expression, as the 棕色老鼠 scrambles away in panic, accompanied by continuous scurrying sounds.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a dark, nighttime forest setting with a playful whistle, a 'meow' sound, and a 'ha ha' laugh, as the black and white cat character, 黑猫警长, in a police uniform, is seen in a tense moment. A 'bang' and a 'squeak' precede a male voice, likely the `红衣鼹鼠领袖`, commanding '弟兄们, 走啊!' (Brothers, let's go!). 黑猫警长 then leaps dramatically through the air, gun drawn, pursuing a group of small, panicked mice, whose frantic squeaks and cries of '妈妈, 妈妈!' (Mommy, mommy!) fill the air, while a female mouse voice asks '啊? 什么声音?' (Ah? What sound?). The chase intensifies with running sounds, as the `红衣鼹鼠领袖`, a large, red-clad mole-like character, authoritatively states '对, 就这!' (Right, just here!) and commands '给我断!' (Cut it off!), knocking down one of the mice, including a brown mouse in a yellow vest and blue helmet (棕色老鼠). The mice cry '妈妈, 警长来了!' (Mommy, the chief is here!), to which the mole leader responds '别怕, 快跟妈妈走!' (Don't be afraid, quickly follow mommy!). He then commands a line of small mice dressed in red and blue (小红蓝老鼠) to '把这些粮食全搬走, 看他们怎么过冬!' (Move all this food away, let's see how they'll get through winter!), before boastfully exclaiming '看我鲤鱼跳龙门!' (Watch me do the carp leaping over the dragon gate!). The setting then transitions to a brightly lit indoor environment, where a gray mouse in a red shirt and blue pants, the `灰鼠盗贼`, joyfully places a large orange fish into a sack with accompanying sounds of items being moved. The scene ends with the `灰鼠盗贼` using a crowbar to pry open a wooden chest, making prying sounds and a triumphant '嘿!', revealing a stash of gold coins, as he exclaims '我抢!' (I snatch!) twice, indicating a successful robbery.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with a gray mouse, wearing a light green shirt and brown pants, struggling to pull a large wooden chest with a crowbar, accompanied by sounds of pulling and a distinct thump. As the chest is revealed to contain bottles of red liquid, a chaotic celebration erupts among several other mice, dressed in colorful outfits, marked by excited squeals, cheers of "Hey!" and "Drink!", and sounds of enthusiastic guzzling and burps. One mouse in a blue and yellow checkered vest becomes particularly intoxicated, stumbling and making satisfied, slurred sounds like "Ah, what's wrong?" and "This person has a good wild taste." The scene shifts to a large, red-clad mole-like character with glasses, who observes the mice with a stern expression. His deep, authoritative voice cuts through the revelry, commanding, "When robbing, no drinking! Hurry and move!" The mice, initially surprised with an "Aiyoh!", then excitedly exclaim "It's wine! Want to drink!" before the mole leader reiterates, "Don't forget your mission, hurry and move!" The mice collectively respond with a "Yes!" As they begin to carry large sacks across the simple outdoor setting, the mole leader is shown again, now with a mischievous grin, while an upbeat, slightly mischievous background music underscores their frantic activity, indicating his orchestration of the events. The final frames show the mole leader in a close-up, smiling slyly.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with an upbeat, slightly mischievous background music as the '灰鼠盗贼', a gray mouse in a red shirt and gray cap, is seen holding a large sack of stolen goods, including a basket of green eggs. The scene quickly shifts to a close-up of the '红衣鼹鼠领袖', a large mole-like character, who smirks mischievously, suggesting his orchestration of the theft. The setting transitions to a nighttime outdoor environment where the '彩色老鼠团伙', a group of small mice, are seen celebrating in a blue cart filled with loot, including bottles of red liquid and pumpkins, as they are pulled by a gray mouse. Amidst the ongoing music and sounds of scurrying, a female voice urgently warns, "Bad guys are in the treasury, they're going to call the police! You guys stay here, don't move. No matter what happens, don't go out!" The '红衣鼹鼠领袖' then appears, standing over the '小红蓝老鼠', a group of small mice dressed in red and blue outfits, who are lined up and appear to be under his command. The scene cuts to the '灰鼠盗贼' and other mice pulling a wooden cart loaded with stolen goods, including a large pumpkin and bottles, as excited male voices shout "Go catch!" and "Hurry!", with others exclaiming "They're coming, they're coming!" as they are chased by the '黑猫警长', a black and white cat in a police uniform, who leaps into action, running and pointing while holding a gun and a walkie-talkie. The '彩色老鼠团伙' continues drinking red liquid and celebrating, with the '灰鼠盗贼' appearing intoxicated, while the '红衣鼹鼠领袖' observes the chaos with a stern expression. Suddenly, the female voice exclaims, "Right, the alarm bell!" The tension escalates with a deep, villainous laugh from the '红衣鼹鼠领袖', who mockingly challenges, "You little punk, still want to fight with me, your old man," and commands, "He wants to call the police, smash him to death!" Sounds of struggle and a small "ouch" are heard. The final scenes show the '彩色老鼠团伙' dropping their loot, including the basket of green eggs, as they are caught by the '黑猫警长', who stands triumphantly over the scattered goods, accompanied by his distinct meows and growls. The environment shifts from a dimly lit indoor setting to a bright outdoor grassy area, with the lighting changing from dark to light, reflecting the transition from planning to action and capture.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a gray mouse, the '灰鼠盗贼', pulling a large blue cart through a futuristic room, accompanied by cartoonish whining and struggling sounds. A commanding voice then orders, "Let him go, hurry up!" as the scene shifts to a brown mouse, the '棕色老鼠', confidently declaring, "I play machines, I'm an expert!" and later, "Heh, impressive, right?" amidst intense mechanical whirring, suggesting it's operating something. This is followed by a chaotic sequence of high-pitched squealing, frantic mechanical sounds, and a loud crash, as the '棕色老鼠' is seen running frantically in a grassy outdoor environment. Urgent voices shout, "Don't let him get away!" while a group of '彩色老鼠团伙' celebrates a post-theft success. The '红衣鼹鼠领袖' smirks, seemingly orchestrating the events. The chaos intensifies with distressed "Ah! Ah!" sounds, followed by a determined voice stating, "Can't let them succeed!" as a blue button is pressed. The scene transitions to a dark night, where a red mole, possibly the '红衣鼹鼠领袖', and a '新角色鼹鼠' are seen tumbling and falling, accompanied by grunts, struggles, and an "Aiyoh!" exclamation. A sigh of relief, "Hoo-shhh, good thing," is heard before a repetitive, high-pitched alarm blares, culminating in a loud, sustained scream of distress as the red mole struggles in a blue barrel. The alarm continues as the video ends on a wide shot of a dark, starry night.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with dramatic, suspenseful music as 黑猫警长, the black and white cat detective in his police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, holds a walkie-talkie against a starry blue sky, signaling an urgent mission. The suspense builds with the revving and accelerating sound of a motorcycle as he rides through the dark with a determined expression, his flashlight beam cutting through the night. The scene shifts to a chaotic indoor setting filled with frantic squeaking and chattering mice, including the 灰鼠盗贼 pulling a cart and the 彩色老鼠团伙, who are seen frantically moving large sacks, suggesting a theft in progress. The 红衣鼹鼠领袖, a large mole in a red outfit and glasses, oversees the operation with a smug expression, commanding in a distinct, villainous voice, "好啊，抓住他！" (Good, catch him!) as the 小红蓝老鼠 stand in formation, listening. As the chaos escalates with more squeaking and a wailing sound, 黑猫警长 bursts in, confronting the thieves with a firm, authoritative voice, declaring, "休想！" (Dream on!) and "让你们跑不了！" (You won't get away!). A chase ensues amidst sounds of struggle and gunshots, with the 灰鼠盗贼 and other mice scattering in panic. The 红衣鼹鼠领袖 shouts, "让你跑！去死吧！" (Let you run! Go to hell!) but 黑猫警长, now wielding a gun, triumphantly asserts, "哪里跑！" (Where do you think you're going!) as victory music swells. The final shot shows the aftermath: the thieves defeated, the stolen goods—broken crates, spilled cherries, and scattered food—spilled, and the detective victorious, standing over the loot with the 白制服小猫警员 beside him. 黑猫警长 then gives orders, "你们到后面去，其余的跟我来！" (You go to the back, the rest follow me!) and reflects, "这些犯罪分子太猖狂了！" (These criminals are too rampant!) while the 红衣鼹鼠领袖 grumbles, "你们这群流氓，简直是！" (You bunch of hooligans, you're simply!).

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the Black Cat Detective, in his signature black and white police uniform with a red cape, leaping into a dimly lit, green-hued room, flashlight and gun in hand, accompanied by stealthy sounds and a gun cocking. He confronts a group of small, frightened mice in red and blue outfits, who squeak in panic and flee as the Black Cat shouts, "站住！不让我开车了！" (Stop! Don't let me drive!). One mouse cries, "不要啊！" (No!), followed by a gunshot and sounds of struggle. A close-up shows the determined Black Cat pointing his gun, then triumphantly standing over scattered loot, including a large sack and a golden object, amidst more gunshots and thuds. The narrative shifts to a white-uniformed cat officer, who reports, "警长，这里有脚印。" (Chief, there are footprints here.), prompting the Black Cat to question, "脚印?" (Footprints?). The officer then eagerly exclaims, "看，那！哎，有个洞，让我来！" (Look, there! Hey, there's a hole, let me handle it!), as a small, crying pinkish mole, struggling and sobbing, is held by its tail, then dropped with a thud and tumbles into a blue barrel, frantically trying to climb out. The Black Cat declares, "好啊，是你们这群小坏蛋！" (Aha, it's you little rascals!), but then cautions, "慢着，别急着下结论，先把洞里搜查一下。" (Wait, don't jump to conclusions, first search inside the hole.). A mouse cries, "妈妈，他们说我是坏的，可我不是坏的，也没有坏啊！" (Mommy, they say I'm bad, but I'm not bad, and I haven't done anything bad!), to which the Black Cat responds with a surprised "啊?". He then states, "他们是吃虫子的动物，名叫蛐螋。我们要找的嫌犯不是他们。" (They are insect-eating animals, called earwigs. The suspects we're looking for are not them.), as the mice continue to wail, one adding, "我们本来就不坏嘛！" (We weren't bad to begin with!). The final shot shows the red-and-blue mice crying in a puddle of water, emphasizing their distress, all set against a tense, dramatic background score with environmental sounds of splashing and struggling.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens with a close-up of a small mouse in a red and blue outfit, crying and wailing in distress, followed by a group of similar small mice, also in red and blue, splashing and crying in a puddle. They speak with child-like voices, expressing their fear and explaining that their 'mama' disappeared after going to report 'bad guys' in the valley. The Black Cat Detective then appears with a stern expression, holding a walkie-talkie, and with an authoritative male voice, promises, 'I will definitely save your mama!' before declaring, 'Let's go!' He then leaps into action, pushing the crying mice into a line. Heroic music swells as the Black Cat Detective announces, 'Black Cat is here!' and 'Start action!' The scene transitions to a mountainous landscape at dusk with colorful orbs, as a terrified brown mouse with a white stripe, yellow vest, and blue helmet runs frantically through the grass. The Black Cat Detective, riding a blue motorcycle with a loud revving engine, chases the fleeing mouse. The chase intensifies with the sound of the motorcycle's engine and squealing tires as the mouse narrowly avoids a falling log, which crashes with a distinct impact, creating a star-shaped mark. The detective skillfully maneuvers his motorcycle, performing a jump over the obstacle, urging, 'Persevere to the end!' The chase concludes with the Black Cat Detective standing triumphantly, holding his walkie-talkie, while the brown mouse lies defeated on the ground amidst scattered loot, marked by a final '哎!' from the detective, as triumphant music plays.

The scene shifts dramatically to a high vantage point where the Black Cat Detective and his team confront a group of mischievous mice atop a rocky outcrop. A brown mouse, the '棕色老鼠', wearing a yellow vest and blue helmet, stands defiantly with a dagger, while the '红衣鼹鼠领袖', a large mole-like character in red, observes from above with a smirk, loudly commanding, "Moles, hang him up!" amidst the distressed squeals of mice. The Black Cat Detective leaps into action, disarming the brown mouse, who cries out "Help!" and "Let me down!" as he tumbles off the cliff. He lands near a group of '小红蓝老鼠' who are cowering in fear, screaming "Don't catch me!". The '红衣鼹鼠领袖' then boasts, "The gold is in my hands, if you dare come over, I'll tear him to pieces!", before being confronted by the detective. As the mole hangs precariously from a rope, the small mice plead, "Quickly catch those bad guys! They've moved all the gold and grain from the warehouse, can't let them go!" The scene ends with the Black Cat Detective standing triumphantly over the scattered loot, while the '小红蓝老鼠' wail in defeat in a puddle of water, crying "Run!" and "Ah!", their cries echoing the dramatic shift from a bright, sunny outdoor setting to a more action-packed confrontation atop a rocky cliff, emphasized by dynamic camera angles and a triumphant musical close.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with dynamic, heroic background music accompanying the 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform with a red cape, white gloves, and a cap, as he leaps through the air holding a walkie-talkie, chasing fleeing mice. Sounds of accelerating and skidding vehicles, followed by a crash and a "thump," punctuate the action. The scene transitions to a grassy outdoor environment where the 小红蓝老鼠, small mice in red and blue outfits, cower and run in panic amidst more vehicle sounds and skids, while the 灰鼠盗贼, a gray mouse in a red shirt and gray cap, pulls a large blue cart. The 黑猫警长 lands dramatically with a "thump," confronting the mice, his determined expression highlighted as he points forward. The background music shifts to a suspenseful, investigative tone as the scene moves to a dark, enclosed space. The 黑猫警长 enters with a flashlight, his footsteps audible, followed by the 白制服小猫警员, a smaller cat in a white uniform. The 黑猫警长 utters an inquisitive "嗯?" and then states in a commanding voice, "这些坏蛋能突然消失的无影无踪。这附近一定有暗道。" (These bad guys can disappear without a trace. There must be a secret passage nearby.) He then exclaims, "在这！跟我来！" (Here! Follow me!), leading the way. Inside, they encounter the 红衣鼹鼠领袖, a large mole-like character in a red outfit and glasses, who smirks mischievously. The 黑猫警长 confronts the leader, who is later shown hanging from a rope before a distinct "bang" (gunshot) is heard, followed by a "thud" and a "splash" as the leader falls into a blue barrel. A new character, a pinkish mole (新角色鼹鼠) in a red and black outfit, is also seen tumbling into a barrel. The scene ends with the 黑猫警长 standing triumphantly over scattered loot, while the defeated 小红蓝老鼠 are heard crying and wailing in a puddle of water, accompanied by water sounds, as the environment shifts from bright fields to dark interiors, emphasizing the pursuit's resolution.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens with the Black Cat Detective, a black and white cat in a police uniform, authoritatively commanding "开关" (Switch/On) as he presses a button, triggering a loud, heavy mechanical grinding sound as a large metal door opens to reveal golden corn baskets. He and his subordinate, the white-uniformed cat officer, who urgently exclaims "发现疑犯了, 疑犯在哪里?" (Found the suspect, where is the suspect?) and affirms "是!" (Yes!) to a command, cautiously advance into a dimly lit cavern, their footsteps echoing. The Black Cat Detective uses a handheld device, emitting increasing beeping sounds, to track something, its arrow shifting direction, and declares "锁定目标" (Target locked) and "准备微型粒子爆破" (Prepare for micro-particle blast). Suddenly, a group of small, colorful mice, screaming and yelping in panic, emerge from a side passage, fleeing, prompting the Black Cat Detective to command "快追!". The detectives pursue, but are ambushed by a cage-like trap that descends with a distinctive "boing" and a loud clang, trapping them, eliciting surprised "啊!"s from both officers. The mice, now revealed as a coordinated gang, laugh triumphantly and mock the trapped detectives with phrases like "哈哈哈哈!", "抓到你了!" (Caught you!), "黑猫警长!" (Black Cat Detective!), and "这上上下下的感受, 不错吧!" (This up and down feeling, isn't it great!). The Black Cat Detective grunts with effort to break free, leaping out with a determined expression. He then uses his walkie-talkie, and his device emits an electronic whirring and a distinct zap, firing a red laser beam that strikes the red-clad mole leader, who lets out a surprised "啊!" as he falls into a blue barrel. The mice scatter in chaos, screaming and wailing "哎呀!" in distress. The Black Cat Detective stands victorious over the scattered loot, telling the defeated mice to "好好享受吧!" (Enjoy it well!) as they cry in a puddle of water.

segments.integrated_caption: The sequence opens with a chaotic chase inside a dimly lit, cavernous environment, where a group of small mice in colorful outfits—some in red and blue, others in yellow and orange—are fleeing in panic, their frantic scurrying and squeaking filling the air. The Black Cat Detective, in his signature black and white police uniform with a red cape and cap, leaps into action, brandishing a red-and-white striped baton, commanding "Aim! Shoot!" before confronting the fleeing mice, who scatter in terror with yelps and thumps. A close-up shows the Black Cat Detective’s determined face as he swings his baton, striking one of the mice, who tumbles backward with a pained cry. The chase continues through narrow passages, with the mice scrambling up steps and over ledges, accompanied by more frantic scurrying and impacts. The Black Cat Detective pursues relentlessly, his movements precise and commanding, urging "Chase! Chase!" One mouse, wearing a blue helmet and yellow vest, is shown falling into a cloud of dust, while another, in a red shirt and gray cap, is seen tumbling down a slope. The Black Cat Detective then uses his baton to strike a large, mole-like figure in a red outfit, who is revealed to be the leader of the group, heard gruffly commanding "Quick! Hurry up!" The leader, with a long snout and glasses, is shown hanging from a rope before being shot by a distinct red laser beam from the detective’s device, causing him to fall with a splash into a blue barrel, possibly uttering a desperate "Xiao Hei!" The scene ends with the Black Cat Detective standing triumphantly over the scattered loot, his baton raised in victory with a final "Ha!", as the defeated mice cry and wail miserably in a puddle of water, their distressed sounds echoing in the dark, shadowy environment with rocky walls and dim lighting, emphasizing the tension and urgency of the chase.

segments.integrated_caption: The sequence opens with the 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, holding a walkie-talkie and appearing alert, as a voice exclaims "你上当了!" (You fell for it!) followed by a laugh. He then leaps into action, his cape flapping with urgency. The scene shifts to a close-up of the gray mouse, the 灰鼠盗贼, who is being sprayed with water from a faucet, struggling and slipping in a puddle, crying out "啊!" and "哎呀!". The 黑猫警长 reappears with a determined expression, confronting the 灰鼠盗贼, who, wearing a red shirt and gray cap, is drenched and slipping, exclaiming "哎，还没变白呀！" (Hey, it hasn't turned white yet!) amidst the splashing. The 黑猫警长 then turns to face the 白制服小猫警员, a smaller, orange and white cat in a white uniform holding a red-and-white baton, ready to assist. An authoritative voice commands, "黄猫班长，用水龙枪！" (Huangmao Ban zhang, use the water cannon!), to which a subordinate responds with a crisp "是!" (Yes!). The two cats coordinate as the 灰鼠盗贼 is sprayed again with a powerful jet of water, accompanied by intense water sounds and the mouse's screams of "啊!". He tumbles backward, falling into a puddle, his body covered in white foam, and struggles to get up, his face contorted in shock as he cries, "哎，糟了！我被洗面粉沾住了！快拉兄弟一把呀！" (Oh, no! I'm covered in washing powder! Quick, give me a hand, brother!) and "哎，糟了！我也被洗面粉沾住了！" (Oh, no! I'm also covered in washing powder!). The 黑猫警长 stands triumphantly, pointing his baton, while the 白制服小猫警员 looks on with a confident smile. The scene ends with the 灰鼠盗贼 lying defeated in the foam-covered puddle, as the two cats stand over him, victorious, with the 黑猫警长 declaring, "把他们铐起来！" (Cuff them!) and accusing them of "抢劫公吨粮食，绑架囚禁..." (robbing tons of grain, kidnapping and imprisoning...). The entire confrontation unfolds against a simple, muted green background, highlighting the characters' exaggerated expressions and dynamic movements, underscored by a dramatic musical score and the sounds of water and struggle.

He cries out in distress with "啊!" and "哎呀!", expresses surprise with "哎，还没变白呀！" (Hey, it hasn't turned white yet!), and later panics, shouting "哎，糟了！我被洗面粉沾住了！快拉兄弟一把呀！" (Oh, no! I'm covered in washing powder! Quick, give me a hand, brother!) and "哎，糟了！我也被洗面粉沾住了！" (Oh, no! I'm also covered in washing powder!).

segments.integrated_caption: The sequence opens with a close-up of the gray 灰鼠盗贼, his expression one of panic and fear as he is restrained by a chain and a dagger, emitting soft 'shhh' sounds. The scene quickly shifts to a wider view where the 黑猫警长, in his signature black and white police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, stands confidently with his baton, flanked by the 白制服小猫警员, who holds a red-and-white baton. The 黑猫警长's firm, authoritative male voice declares, “Violently assaulting police, you will receive the most severe punishment!” as they confront a group of small 小红蓝老鼠. These mice are heard making panicked squeaks, scurrying sounds, and distressed crying and wailing, with some exclaiming “Stop!” and “Oh no!” as they cower and flee, some slipping in a puddle of water. The camera then focuses on the 黑猫警长’s legs as he strides forward, towering over the fleeing mice. A different, mischievous male voice, belonging to the 红衣鼹鼠领袖, is heard saying, “See that? Hurry up and run!” amidst the mice's continued panicked sounds. Suddenly, the perspective shifts to a low-angle shot as the 黑猫警长 leaps into action, drawing his pistol with a determined expression. A powerful “Pew!” sound accompanies a red laser beam shooting from his weapon, striking the 红衣鼹鼠领袖, who is seen hanging from a rope. The 红衣鼹鼠领袖 lets out a pained “哎哟!” as he falls into a blue barrel, initially mocking with laughter, “didn't hit!”, before a surprised “huh?” and a final exclamation of “Ah! He won't come back!” as he struggles and splashes in the barrel. The laser beam is shown in motion, glowing red and trailing smoke. The final frames show the 黑猫警长’s face in close-up, his eyes narrowed in focus, as he continues to aim his weapon, while the defeated 红衣鼹鼠领袖 lies limp and shocked. The environment is dimly lit, with earthy green and brown tones, suggesting an underground or cave-like setting, and the atmosphere is tense and action-packed with sounds of struggle and defeat.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of the 红衣鼹鼠领袖 screaming in distress as he is struck by a red laser beam from the 黑猫警长’s device, his body recoiling violently, accompanied by a sharp laser sound. He cries out, "耳朵，我只有一只耳朵了！" (Ear, I only have one ear left!), followed by a voice declaring, "以后，他就改名叫一只耳吧！" (From now on, he'll be called One-Ear!), amidst mocking laughter. The scene quickly shifts to a group of 白制服小猫警员 and 黑猫警长, who are joyfully reading a newspaper with a headline celebrating the capture of the thief, their expressions triumphant. The focus then moves to the now defeated 红衣鼹鼠领袖, tumbling with a thud into a blue barrel, his red outfit and glasses still visible as he falls. The scene transitions to a dimly lit cave where the 棕色老鼠, carrying a sack, is heard asking "照片呢？舅舅的照片呢？" (Where's the photo? Uncle's photo?) while running frantically toward the exit, accompanied by rustling sounds. He then exclaims, "啊？在这儿！舅舅吃猫鼠！" (Ah? Here it is! Uncle Cat-Eating Mouse!), followed by a camera click sound. He emerges into a bright, sunlit landscape, where he is confronted by the 黑猫警长, who is now holding a photograph of the mouse, his eyes narrowed in determination. The 黑猫警长 then examines a file labeled '待办' (To Do) with a paper rustling sound, his expression serious, stating, "这次让恐怖分子一只耳逃脱，他一定还会对森林公民的生命财产安全造成威胁。一定要抓住他！" (This time, letting the terrorist One-Ear escape, he will definitely pose a threat to the life and property safety of the forest citizens. We must catch him!). Meanwhile, the 棕色老鼠 is heard muttering, "黑猫准会盯着我，那我怎么找我舅舅吃猫鼠呢？我得想个办法转移他们的视线。" (Black Cat will definitely be watching me, so how can I find my Uncle Cat-Eating Mouse? I need to find a way to divert their attention.), as the scene shifts to a dark, forested area where he is seen running through the underbrush with frantic running sounds and a tense, fast-paced background music. Finally, the video ends with a cheerful scene of a group of animals, including a panda, a rabbit, and a monkey, riding in a red tractor through a lush green field, waving happily to the sound of a vehicle starting, cheerful music, animal sounds, and a voice saying "坐好了！" (Sit tight!), suggesting a return to peace and normalcy after the conflict.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens with a cheerful, slightly mischievous background music accompanying a red tractor, driven by a white rabbit in red overalls, pulling a cart through a vibrant green landscape under a clear blue sky. A voice exclaims, "Hey hey, let's go dig red soil to build a wall!" A panda in a yellow shirt and green shorts digs with a shovel in a sandy area, while the rabbit pulls a bucket of dirt up a rope. A monkey in a red and white outfit swings from a vine and helps lift a heavy load with another monkey, showcasing teamwork. The rabbit then drives the red tractor, pulling the dirt-filled cart across rolling hills, punctuated by a bell-like sound and an approving "Good! Great!" The focus shifts to a brown mouse, later identified as "One-Ear," with a white headband and yellow vest, who appears to be sneaking through the grass. He is shown in close-up, smiling mischievously and pointing, suggesting a plan. After running through the field, passing a small red-and-white striped house, and hiding behind a tree to watch the tractor pass, he complains, "Oh, my legs are so sore, ah." He then exclaims with delight, "Ah! So it's the red soil transport vehicle, looks like my luck is pretty good!" He laughs, adding, "Taxis are too expensive these days, only a fool wouldn't hitch a ride!" As the tractor continues its journey through sandy hills and lush green fields under a bright, sunny sky, One-Ear, now seemingly on the vehicle, reveals his cunning plan: "Sitting on the red soil transport vehicle, One-Ear came up with an idea, planning to steal it!" The peaceful, rural setting remains consistent throughout.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the distinct rumbling and chugging sounds of a red tractor, driven by a white rabbit in red overalls, pulling a cart loaded with large brown rocks through a vibrant green field. A character's voice exclaims, "Hey, Officer Mao, hey, we've arrived!" followed by another saying, "They haven't arrived yet, I'll lie down for a bit." Suddenly, the cart tips over with a crash, spilling the rocks, and a brown mouse with a white stripe on its head, wearing a yellow vest and blue helmet, tumbles out, landing in the grass. The mouse, in a panicked voice, cries, "Aiyo, lift your leg quickly, lift your leg quickly! Aiya, if it's too late, I'll gnaw on potato chips! Lift your leg quickly!" as it appears dazed and distressed, crawling through the foliage, clutching a brown satchel. A gruff voice threatens, "If he made us come all this way for nothing, I'll eat him!" and then, "Aiyo, speak, what good news? Otherwise, I'll stomp you flat!" The scene shifts to a wide aerial view showing a circular stone wall being built around a small house, with various animals—including the white rabbit, a panda, and a monkey—working together to construct it. The brown mouse is seen climbing the wall, struggling to keep up, then excitedly announces, "Good news, of course there's good news, look over there!" as the camera zooms in on its wide, anxious eyes and open mouth gasping for breath. Other voices exclaim, "So many sweet potatoes!" and "A year's worth of nutrition is all here!" The mouse continues to crawl through the greenery, its expression shifting from panic to determination, while a joyful voice encourages, "Eat your fill, eat as much as you want!" The final shot focuses on the stone wall, now nearly complete, symbolizing the collective effort of the animals in the lush, sunlit green field, with the mouse exclaiming in pure joy, "So great, I've dreamed of eating my fill, eating my fill!"

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a vibrant, cheerful scene in a lush green field where a group of animated animal characters, including a panda in a yellow shirt carrying a boombox and an energetic monkey in a red and white outfit, joyfully dance and celebrate around a small house. Cheerful, upbeat music plays as voices exclaim "我想要好了" and "太可愛了," followed by repeated "謝謝大家," setting a lively, celebratory mood. The scene transitions to a close-up of the monkey covering his eyes, accompanied by a stylized visual effect of hands clapping and a circular motion, suggesting a musical or rhythmic theme. The celebration continues with all characters dancing together in a lively, colorful environment. The scene then shifts dramatically to nighttime, showing a dark forest with small houses illuminated by soft lights, accompanied by a change in music to a more suspenseful, atmospheric tone. Inside one house, two white rabbits with long ears are peacefully sleeping under a teal blanket. Suddenly, they wake up with wide, red eyes in shock, letting out a startled "Ah!" and jumping out of bed in fear, exclaiming "這是什麼妖怪啊？" and "這是太可怕了." The camera pans to a window showing the dark, starry night sky, emphasizing the sudden shift from joy to suspense and mystery.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens with a gentle, whimsical tune as a teal blanket rests on a green floor beneath a blue-and-white checkered table. The camera then tilts upward to reveal a window with a cross-shaped frame, showing a clear blue sky with a small cloud. The scene cuts back to the blanket, which suddenly lifts to reveal a white rabbit with red eyes, wide-eyed and startled, making distressed 'Ha?' and 'Ah!' sounds, as if waking from a nightmare. The rabbit, wearing red overalls, rushes out of a wooden door and down a set of steps, looking panicked. Outside, in a vibrant green field, a brown monkey in a red shirt appears distressed, wiping sweat from his brow, crying out, 'What happened to the sound wall!' Nearby, a black-and-white panda in a yellow shirt and green shorts dances joyfully with a boombox, comforting the monkey by saying, 'Little monkey, don't cry.' A small hedgehog and another rabbit in orange overalls watch. The monkey then reports, 'Everyone come look, my new sound wall is destroyed!' and later, 'Reporting, Police Chief Black Cat, last night a monster came here,' explaining, 'But they made scary sounds, and little monkey's sound wall was also destroyed.' The scene shifts to a black cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, holding a green telephone receiver, looking serious and focused, calmly reassuring the monkey, 'Hmm, don't be afraid, there are no monsters in the world.' The rabbit, still in red overalls, is shown again, now holding a brown object, possibly a phone or tool, with a worried expression. The black cat is then seen again, now with a determined look, instructing, 'Don't worry, you must protect the scene. We're coming,' before hanging up the phone with a distinct click. An urgent, electronic alert sound accompanies a control panel with a red light flashing, indicating an emergency. Outside, a loud, blaring red siren atop an orange van parked on a dirt road, surrounded by trees, signals the unfolding situation. The black cat, now on a powerful black motorcycle, speeds toward the van, followed by another officer on a blue motorcycle, their engines roaring. The van then drives away along a winding path through the green hills, its engine also roaring, with the two officers in pursuit, as the background music becomes more intense and action-oriented, suggesting a chase or emergency response has begun.

Outside, a red siren blares atop an orange van parked on a dirt road, surrounded by trees. The black cat, now on a motorcycle, speeds toward the van, followed by another officer on a blue motorcycle. The van then drives away along a winding path through the green hills, with the two officers in pursuit, suggesting a chase or emergency response has begun.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a vibrant green field where the 白制服小猫警员, with a high-pitched voice, exclaims "Chief, look!" as she confronts a frightened white rabbit in red overalls, who raises his hands in surrender. The 黑猫警长 arrives, dressed in his signature uniform, and sternly asks the rabbit in his authoritative voice, "Is the eyewitness here? State the situation." The terrified 白色兔子, with wide red eyes, recounts in a frightened, high-pitched voice, "Last night, several monsters walked past our window, they were *that* big!" The 黑猫警长 then makes a questioning "Hmm?" before pointing at a large, deep footprint, observing in his authoritative voice, "Such large footprints, and more than one kind." A narrator explains that the Black Cat Detective quickly identified the target and deployed a battle plan. The 黑猫警长 then turns to a yellow cat officer and points toward a tree, issuing orders: "Tonight, Group One, ambush there," and "Group Two, ambush here." A high-pitched, slightly whiny voice asks, "What about us?" to which the 黑猫警长 reassures the "citizens" in a firm voice, "Tonight you can sleep soundly. We will definitely find a way to catch these saboteurs. We guarantee to round them all up and protect the safety of our forest citizens." The group, including a blue-and-white cat officer, follows the 黑猫警长 into a dense green forest. The scene transitions to nighttime, with dark silhouettes of trees and a small blue-roofed house visible. A shadowy figure, the 神秘黑影, moves stealthily through the forest, its glowing green eye briefly visible, as a gruff, villainous voice commands, "Idiot, over there!" An accomplice agrees, "Oh, right right right!" and another excitedly adds, "I can't wait!" The villainous voice then cautions, "Wait, let's see if they're asleep yet," met with murmurs of agreement, creating a sense of suspense and danger.

The scene shifts to the 黑猫警长 pointing at a large, deep footprint in the ground, indicating a clue, while the 白制服小猫警员 looks on with concern. The 黑猫警长 then turns to a yellow cat officer, who appears surprised, and points toward a tree, suggesting a direction of investigation. The group, including a blue-and-white cat officer, follows the 黑猫警长 into a dense green forest. The 黑猫警长, with a determined look, raises his hand as if giving a command. segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with a dark, eerie night scene, featuring a small green house surrounded by a circular stone wall under a deep blue, star-filled night sky, accompanied by suspenseful music and stealthy rustling sounds. A shadowy, dark figure with glowing red eyes emerges, moving stealthily through the forest, making a low growl and a distinct "shhh" sound, followed by a deep voice remarking, "好香啊" (So fragrant/delicious), hinting at a lurking threat. The scene shifts to the stern and alert 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform, joined by the concerned 白制服小猫警员 in a white uniform. A sharp gunshot rings out, prompting the 白制服小猫警员 to exclaim with urgency, "看，警长发信号了！行动！" (Look, the chief sent a signal! Move!). The officers are then seen in a vehicle, possibly a police car, with the 黑猫警长 pointing forward with determination, as the engine starts and accelerates. Suddenly, a loud, animalistic roar is heard, and the 白制服小猫警员 panics, shouting, "不好！我们已经被包围了！" (Oh no! We're already surrounded!) and "不好，有埋伏！" (Oh no, an ambush!). A large, green, elephant-like creature and a brown, pig-like creature with tusks appear startled and panicked, while the 黑猫警长 commands firmly, "站住!" (Stop!). The officers are shown running through the forest, with the 白制服小猫警员 holding a red-and-white baton, amidst grunts and struggling sounds. The chase intensifies with more panicked squeals, and a voice, possibly from one of the fleeing creatures, shouts, "兵分三路，各自逃！" (Split into three paths, escape separately!). The 黑猫警长, still commanding "站住！别跑！" (Stop! Don't run!), then reflects, "天下果然没有免费的晚餐！" (There really is no free lunch in this world!). The officers fall and tumble through the dark woods, with the 黑猫警长 landing with a determined expression. A large, brown, dinosaur-like creature with a long snout roars menacingly, attacking the officers and throwing them into the air with a loud "thump" and "whoosh". The scene ends with the 黑猫警长 and his officer lying on the ground, exhausted and defeated, making distressed whimpers and gasps, while the triumphant dinosaur-like creature stands over them, all under the dark, foreboding night sky and dense forest.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a dark, eerie night scene featuring a small green house surrounded by a circular stone wall, set against a deep blue night sky with stars. The atmosphere is tense and mysterious. A shadowy, dark figure with glowing red eyes emerges from the darkness, moving stealthily through the forest, suggesting a lurking threat. The scene then shifts to reveal the 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, looking stern and alert. He is joined by a 白制服小猫警员, a smaller cat in a white uniform with a blue helmet, who appears concerned. The two officers are seen in a vehicle, possibly a police car, with the 黑猫警长 pointing forward with determination. The 黑猫警长 and his officer are then shown running through the forest, with the 白制服小猫警员 holding a red-and-white baton, indicating a pursuit. The chase intensifies as the officers are seen falling and tumbling through the dark woods, with the 黑猫警长 landing on the ground with a determined expression. The scene then shows the two officers being attacked by a large, brown, dinosaur-like creature with a long snout, who roars menacingly. The officers are thrown into the air, and the scene ends with the 黑猫警长 and his officer lying on the ground, exhausted and defeated, while the dinosaur-like creature stands over them, triumphant. The environment remains dark and foreboding throughout, with the night sky and dense forest adding to the suspense and danger of the chase.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens under a dark blue night sky with a crescent moon, as a large, brown, hippo-like creature wearing a white collar and black gloves leaps into a river with a splash. Underwater, it swims with a joyful expression, exhaling bubbles, and its deep, guttural voice exclaims, "This is great now!" and "Underwater swimming is my strong suit, so comfortable." It surfaces with a contented sigh, looking curious. Suddenly, a commanding male voice announces, "Attention everyone, activate hovercraft mode!" as 黑猫警长, a black-and-white cat in a police uniform with a red cape, speeds through the night on a futuristic white motorcycle with a loud engine rev. The scene shifts to a dark forest where the hippo-like creature runs, startled, letting out a gasp and then exclaiming, "These days, catching pigs can go up trees, Black Cat Detective is alive!" A yellow, flying saucer-like vehicle, piloted by a small figure in a white suit, appears, and its pilot's high-pitched, distorted voice shouts, "There!" The hippo-like creature continues to run with a determined, then frantic, expression, shouting "Who's pulling my pants?!" and "Oh no, I'm exposed!" followed by panicked grunts and denials, "That's not me, I'm just passing by, minding my own business!" as the flying saucer descends and lands nearby. Meanwhile, 黑猫警长 and a smaller cat, 白制服小猫警员, in a white uniform, stand beside two inflatable rafts in a dark, grassy area. 黑猫警长 crouches, pointing at something on the ground with a serious expression, while 白制服小猫警员 looks on with concern. The two then run through the forest, with 黑猫警长 leading, before he crouches again, pointing, and begins to say, "Hey? Isn't this..." as the segment ends.

The creature leaps into the water with a splash, then swims underwater with a joyful expression, exhaling bubbles. It surfaces and looks around, appearing curious and content. Suddenly, a small, black-and-white cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, identified as 黑猫警长, rides a futuristic white motorcycle with a red stripe, speeding through the night. The scene shifts to a dark forest where the hippo-like creature is seen running through the trees, looking startled. A yellow, flying saucer-like vehicle with a blue and yellow design appears, piloted by a small figure in a white suit with a blue helmet. The hippo-like creature continues to run, now with a determined expression, as the flying saucer hovers nearby. The scene then shows the 黑猫警长 and a smaller cat in a white uniform with a blue helmet, identified as 白制服小猫警员, standing beside two blue and yellow inflatable rafts in a dark, grassy area. The 黑猫警长 crouches, pointing at something on the ground with a serious expression, while the 白制服小猫警员 looks on with concern. The 黑猫警长 and 白制服小猫警员 are shown running through the forest, with the 黑猫警长 leading the way and the 白制服小猫警员 following closely behind. The scene ends with the 黑猫警长 crouching again, pointing at something on the ground, while the 白制服小猫警员 looks on with a concerned expression.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens in a dark, dense jungle at night, illuminated by a deep blue sky with stars and a crescent moon, where a small, glowing white object draws attention. Suddenly, the 黑猫警长 bursts into the frame on his futuristic motorcycle, stopping abruptly. He dismounts, revealing his black-and-white police uniform with a red cape, white gloves, and a cap with a yellow insignia. He is joined by the 白制服小猫警员, who holds a red-and-white baton. Together, they cautiously approach a large, brown, dinosaur-like creature, which the 黑猫警长 identifies, asking in a stern male voice, "Is it Hippo's pants?" The creature, appearing startled, distressed, sweating, and crying, responds in a child-like voice, "I'm not a hippo!" and later, "I'm playing hide-and-seek." The 黑猫警长 commands, "Come out!" The creature whimpers and cries out, "Isn't it enough that I admit my mistake?" followed by a loud, distressed roar. Intense, dramatic music swells as the creature, now confirmed as the Hippo, runs frantically through the jungle, exclaiming, "Watch my diversion!" It is followed by a large, green, elephant-like creature, both appearing panicked amidst sounds of heavy movement and crashing. The 黑猫警长 and 白制服小猫警员 follow closely, with the 黑猫警长 using a blue handheld radio to communicate, his expression serious and focused. He asks, "Where did it run to?" then strategizes, "Got it! The most dangerous place is the safest place," and instructs, "No matter how well you hide, it's useless. Use the thermal tracker to search," as beeping sounds emanate from the device. After asking "Where is it?" and hearing footsteps, he commands, "Good, now increase precision," leading to faster beeping. Finally, he declares, "It's really here!" and orders, "Use the stun baton!" followed by a zapping sound, maintaining the tense and mysterious atmosphere of the urgent pursuit.
segments.visual_original_caption: The scene opens in a dark, dense jungle at night, illuminated by a deep blue sky with stars and a crescent moon. A small, glowing white object is seen in the distance, drawing attention. Suddenly, the 黑猫警长 (Black Cat Detective) bursts into the frame on his futuristic motorcycle, stopping abruptly as he spots something. He dismounts, revealing his black-and-white police uniform with a red cape, white gloves, and a cap with a yellow insignia. He is joined by the 白制服小猫警员 (small cat officer in white uniform with a blue helmet), who holds a red-and-white baton. Together, they cautiously approach a large, brown, dinosaur-like creature (大型恐龙状生物) with a long snout and sharp teeth, which appears startled and distressed, sweating and crying. The creature is then shown running frantically through the jungle, followed by a large, green, elephant-like creature (绿色大象状生物) with a long trunk and large ears, both appearing panicked. The 黑猫警长 and 白制服小猫警员 follow closely, with the 黑猫警长 using a blue handheld radio to communicate, his expression serious and focused. The scene shifts to a close-up of the radio, then back to the 黑猫警长, who points forward with determination, signaling the next move in their pursuit. The atmosphere is tense and mysterious, with the dark jungle and night sky enhancing the sense of urgency and danger.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens at night in a dark, forested area under a starry sky, as a large, brown, pig-like creature with tusks and a red lower body tumbles through the air with a loud crash and pained grunt, landing heavily. It immediately cries out in a deep male voice, "逃脱了，逃脱了！" (Escaped, escaped!). The 黑猫警长, a black-and-white cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, appears alongside two 白制服小猫警员, both in white uniforms with blue helmets and red-and-white batons. One of the 白制服小猫警员, with a young male voice, exclaims, "老鼠呢！" (Where's the mouse/rat!). The 黑猫警长 points accusingly at the startled and defensive pig-like creature, then authoritatively states, "请你去森林公安局，交代犯罪经过。" (Please go to the Forest Public Security Bureau and explain the crime.). The creature defiantly retorts, "这个破猫，吓唬不了我！" (This broken cat can't scare me!), while another 白制服小猫警员 urges, "你这老鼠，还不快束手就擒！" (You rat, why don't you surrender quickly!). As the 白制服小猫警员 approach cautiously, the 黑猫警长 leaps into action, swinging a baton and striking the creature amidst sounds of struggle and impacts. The creature stumbles backward, then retaliates by charging, knocking the 黑猫警长 into a tree. With an angry, boastful cry of "哎哟，让你知道我的厉害！" (Oh, let me show you how powerful I am!), the creature continues to fight. The 黑猫警长 recovers, grabs a baton, and strikes again, causing the creature to fall. The creature then challenges, "有本事下来，一对一PK！" (If you have the guts, come down and fight one-on-one!), to which the 黑猫警长 confidently replies, "好！给你个心服口服！" (Good! I'll make you truly convinced!). After more sounds of impacts and struggle, including the distinct click of handcuffs, the 黑猫警长 handcuffs the now defeated and dazed creature, who lets out a distressed wail, "哎哟我的妈呀！哎哟！我的牙！我的牙！" (Oh my god! Oh! My teeth! My teeth!), as the 白制服小猫警员 stand by, observing the tense and action-packed capture sequence in the dark, shadowy forest.
segments.visual_original_caption: The scene opens at night in a dark, forested area under a starry sky, where a large, brown, pig-like creature with tusks and a red lower body tumbles through the air, landing heavily on the ground. The 黑猫警长, a black-and-white cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, appears alongside two 白制服小猫警员, both in white uniforms with blue helmets and red-and-white batons. The 黑猫警长 points accusingly at the pig-like creature, who looks startled and defensive. The 白制服小猫警员 approach cautiously, one holding a baton, as the 黑猫警长 leaps into action, swinging a baton and striking the creature. The pig-like creature stumbles backward, then retaliates by charging, knocking the 黑猫警长 into a tree. The 黑猫警长 recovers, grabs a baton, and strikes again, causing the creature to fall. The 黑猫警长 then handcuffs the creature, who looks defeated and dazed, while the 白制服小猫警员 stand by, observing. The environment remains dark and shadowy, with trees and rocks forming the backdrop, and the atmosphere is tense and action-packed, emphasizing a chase and capture sequence.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a dark, shadowy figure moving stealthily through a forest at night, setting a suspenseful tone. The scene quickly shifts to a bright, sunny green field where a group of animated animals, including a panda, a white rabbit, a monkey, and a brown mouse, are gathered, appearing cheerful and excited. A distressed, large, brown, pig-like creature with tusks, wearing a green vest and red pants, whimpers and screams, being led by the stern and authoritative 黑猫警长 (black and white cat in a police uniform) with a chain. Someone calls out "黑猫警长!" as the pig-like creature is accused of stealing sweet potatoes, to which it defensively replies, "不是偷吃，这是我们的围墙！" (Not stealing, this is our fence!). A large, green, elephant-like creature with a long trunk, wearing a blue shirt and black pants, then attacks the pig-like creature, taunting with a contemptuous voice, "哼，傻瓜！" (Hmph, idiot!) and "造房还不如租房呢！" (Building a house is not as good as renting one!), complaining about the destruction of a house. 黑猫警长 commands, "停下！" (Stop!) and warns, "不然我们要采取行动了！" (Otherwise, we will take action!). The elephant-like creature dismissively retorts, "哼，腐朽！" (Hmph, rotten!) and challenges, "看我来去制服你们！" (Watch me come and subdue you!), boasting about its "鼻弹波波球" (nose-bullet bouncy ball) attack. The scene transitions to a confrontation where the aggressive elephant-like creature is subdued by 黑猫警长 and his officers, now in white uniforms with blue helmets and red-and-white batons. 黑猫警长 shouts, "跟我上！抓捕他！" (Follow me! Capture him!) as the officers, including a yellow cat and a blue cat, engage in a coordinated attack with batons, accompanied by grunts, impacts, and whooshing sounds. The elephant-like creature, taunting "来抓我呀!" (Come catch me!) and "不自量力!" (Overestimating oneself!) amidst the struggle, eventually falls to the ground, defeated. The black cat stands triumphantly, while the officers surround the fallen creature, indicating a successful capture. The background remains consistently a bright, green field with trees and a stone wall, suggesting a rural or forested setting. The overall atmosphere shifts from suspense to action and resolution, with the black cat and his officers emerging as the clear victors.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens in a vibrant green forest with an upbeat, slightly mischievous background music. A large, gray elephant-like creature, wearing a blue vest and white collar, appears startled as a small white cat in a blue-and-white helmet and white uniform (a new officer) runs past with a distinct 'thwack' sound, wielding a red-and-white baton. A male voice comments, "Awesome, right?" followed by another stating, "To deal with thick-skinned ones, special methods must be used," before a command of "Prepare, go!" The elephant, initially surprised, soon becomes aggressive, letting out grunts and roars, then uses its trunk to spray a yellow substance, possibly water or a chemical, at the approaching cat, accompanied by a distinct spraying sound. The cat dodges with a yelp and retaliates by swinging its baton, but the elephant retaliates by wrapping its trunk around the cat, lifting it into the air amidst more grunts. The scene escalates with intense action music as multiple small white-uniformed cats, each with blue helmets, appear, attempting to restrain the roaring elephant with chains. The elephant, now visibly angry, shakes them off with powerful grunts, causing the cats to fly through the air with yelps and impacts. One cat, with a yellow helmet, is shown being thrown violently with a 'thump,' while another is seen crawling on the ground, dazed, possibly uttering, "You won't beat us to death, right?" The elephant then turns its attention to a black-and-white cat in a police uniform with a red cape and cap (the 黑猫警长), who stands defiantly, baton raised, as a voice shouts "Charge!" The 黑猫警长 confronts the elephant, who then turns and charges toward a brown, pig-like creature chained to a black, bear-like creature. The pig-like creature, wearing a green vest and red pants, looks distressed as the elephant approaches, suggesting a confrontation or rescue is imminent, all set against the consistent bright, cartoonish environment of green hills and a clear blue sky.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the 黑猫警长 standing defiantly in a lush green field, holding a baton, as a gray mouse lies defeated at his feet, accompanied by a mouse squeak and a 'ding' sound. The scene quickly shifts to a close-up of a hand holding a small black object, before cutting to a tree where several colorful birds and chicks are perched, chirping softly. The setting then transitions to a makeshift courtroom, marked by a gavel sound, where the authoritative voice of the 大型猫头鹰法官 declares, "森林法庭，现在开庭！" (Forest Court, now in session!), immediately followed by a command for silence: "请大家安静！" (Everyone, please be quiet!) and "带嫌犯！" (Bring the suspect!). The 黑猫警长, the owl judge in a black robe, and a white-uniformed cat officer sit as judges, while a red-haired monkey and a blue-helmeted cat officer are seated at wooden benches below. The focus then moves to the 棕色猪状生物, who emits grunting/snorting sounds, chained to the 新角色黑熊, both appearing distressed. The 黑猫警长 approaches the pig, asking in a calm, interrogative voice, "你为什么要偷吃红土？" (Why did you steal and eat red soil?). The pig, looking up with a mix of fear and hope, responds in a deep, slightly defensive voice, "我们需要一种叫铜的矿物质。" (We need a mineral called copper.). The 黑猫警长 then asks, "那你呢？" (What about you?), prompting a high-pitched female voice (unseen, likely a small animal) to interject, "我的身体缺少一种盐。" (My body lacks a type of salt.) and indignantly add, "你要吃红土，也不能破坏我的心血墙啊！" (Even if you want to eat red soil, you shouldn't destroy my hard-built wall!). This voice then conspiratorially reveals, "有个家伙叫我们敞开肚子吃，想吃多少吃多少。" (Someone told us to eat as much as we wanted, to our heart's content.). The 黑猫警长 sternly demands, "是谁？赶快交代！" (Who was it? Confess quickly!), to which the female voice hesitantly replies, "嗯...是一只耳指使我们吃的。" (Uh... it was One-Ear who told us to eat it.). Another gavel sound signals the owl judge, who, with a deep, authoritative voice, announces, "现在宣布审判结果！" (Now announcing the verdict!) and begins to read from the green '森林公民法' (Forest Citizen Law) book, stating, "根据森林法第八十八条，你们犯了不劳而获罪和掠夺他人劳动成果罪，先..." (According to Article 88 of the Forest Law, you have committed the crime of gaining without labor and plundering the fruits of others' labor, first...), as the pig’s expression shifts from sadness to a hopeful smile, then to relief and determination, with the 黑猫警长 standing beside him, reinforcing the sense of justice being served in this animated courtroom setting.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of a large, dark brown creature with striking green and yellow eyes, followed by a cheerful brown pig-like creature with a green snout, wearing a brown vest, smiling against a bright green background. A joyful group of animals—a panda in a yellow shirt and green shorts, a monkey in a red shirt, a squirrel, and a white rabbit in red overalls—are seen dancing and celebrating in a lush green field under a blue sky. The mood shifts as the 黑猫警长, a black-and-white cat in a police uniform, appears with a confident smile, then confronts a smaller cat in a white uniform, 白制服小猫警员, who looks surprised. The 黑猫警长's authoritative male voice is heard, declaring a verdict on an '大象野猪' (elephant wild boar) to transport yellow earth bricks for three days, and a hippo to transport 30 barrels of yellow earth under Article 99, noting the hippo's better attitude. A large, green elephant-like creature, wearing a blue shirt and black pants, is shown lying on the ground, distressed and clutching its trunk, while the 黑猫警长 stands over it with a stern expression. A group of animal voices exclaim '耶!' and question if the elephant is dead, followed by a huff. The 黑猫警长 orders, '班长，快给大象打一针!' (Squad leader, quickly give the elephant an injection!), to which the 白制服小猫警员 responds with a crisp '是!' (Yes!), accompanied by the sound of a syringe. The 黑猫警长 then reassures, '哎哟，它应该没事' (Oh, it should be fine), as squeaks, thumps, hisses, and wailing sounds are heard. The white rabbit, previously joyful, now appears frightened with wide red eyes, raising its hands in fear. The 黑猫警长 gives a thumbs-up, then addresses '公民们!' (Citizens!), declaring that '大象刚才的行为，已经触犯了森林公民法！' (The elephant's behavior just now has violated the Forest Citizen Law!). The elephant-like creature, now sitting up with a pained expression, groans in a deep voice, '我的头怎么那么晕啊...' (Why is my head so dizzy...). The 黑猫警长 continues to speak to it authoritatively, explaining, '刚才，它还暴力拒捕，威胁我们警士的生命安全。我只好给了它一枚麻醉弹，制止了大象犯罪性质的进一步升级。' (Just now, it violently resisted arrest, threatening the life safety of our officers. I had no choice but to give it a tranquilizer dart, preventing the further escalation of the elephant's criminal nature.) He then interrogates, '大象，你知道错了吗？' (Elephant, do you know you were wrong?), to which the elephant-like creature responds with a deep, groaning voice, '我为了吃饱肚子...' (I, in order to fill my stomach...). The final moments show the 黑猫警长 and the 白制服小猫警员 standing together, with the 黑猫警长 pointing forward, suggesting a new direction or mission, while the elephant-like creature remains seated, looking defeated and contemplative.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a distressed green elephant-like creature, wearing a blue shirt and black pants, lying on the ground. A deep, remorseful male voice, belonging to the creature, apologizes, stating, "Destroyed everyone's living environment, I know I was wrong now, I'm sorry," followed by whistling and bird chirps. The scene quickly shifts to a vibrant green cornfield where a green praying mantis with large eyes and a bow tie clings to a leaf. A brown mouse with a white headband, yellow vest, and blue helmet cautiously navigates through the cornstalks, making rustling sounds and a surprised "Hmm?" He excitedly discovers a corn cob, exclaiming "Corn!" with a joyful giggle, then begins to peel it with a knife, making satisfied eating noises and declaring, "So fragrant!" The mantis reacts with shock, raising its hands in alarm, and asks, "Hey! What's that sound?" The mouse responds, "Be packed back!" and continues eating loudly. The scene transitions to the mantis inside a yellow house, holding a red telephone receiver, looking concerned. The telephone rings, and the mantis reports, "Is this the Public Security Bureau? I saw One-Eared." A female dispatcher's voice responds, "Help me keep an eye on it, traces of One-Eared found in the cornfield, traces of One-Eared." The final shot reveals a black cat in a police uniform with a red cape and white gloves, holding a blue walkie-talkie, standing confidently against a bright blue sky. Walkie-talkie static and chatter are heard, followed by a "Received" from the dispatcher and a "Understood" from the black cat. The video ends with a group of animals, including a panda, a monkey, and a white rabbit, waving as the black cat and another officer fly away on yellow and blue flying saucer-like vehicles, accompanied by the distinct sound of the vehicles, suggesting a successful mission or departure.

He discovers a corn cob and excitedly grabs it, but the mantis, now alarmed, watches from a leaf. The scene transitions to the mantis inside a yellow house, holding a red telephone receiver, looking concerned. segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens with a green praying mantis, identified as 新角色螳螂, looking concerned inside a yellow house, holding a red telephone receiver, before quickly shifting to the same mantis reacting with alarm while clinging to a leaf in a cornfield. Simultaneously, frantic shouts of "抓呀!" (Catch him!) and "伙伴们，在玉米地里他想通缉犯，一枝儿！大家，抓呀！" (Partners, in the cornfield, he's a wanted criminal, Yizhi! Everyone, catch him!) are heard from multiple voices, identifying the target as "一枝儿" and setting a tense, action-oriented background music. The setting then transitions to a lush green forest path where a group of small, sword-wielding green mantises attack the brown mouse, now known as "一枝儿," who is riding a yellow and blue flying saucer-like vehicle. As the mouse is poked and stabbed, a distressed, high-pitched voice cries "救命啊!" (Help me!), while an aggressive mantis voice threatens, "老子灭了你！" (I'll destroy you!) and "你这个坏蛋，别想逃！看我怎么治你！" (You scoundrel, don't think of escaping! Watch how I deal with you!). Vehicle sounds, including whooshes and impacts, punctuate the intense action. The 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform, appears on a similar flying saucer with his 白制服小猫警员, looking determined. A calm, authoritative male voice, likely the 黑猫警长, states, "一枝儿终于又出现了。不知道他下一步会有什么行动。" (Yizhi has finally reappeared. I wonder what his next move will be.). The brown mouse, "一枝儿," falls from his vehicle into a muddy puddle, struggling, visibly injured and exhausted, as shouts of "警长！一枝儿往那边跑了！" (Chief! Yizhi ran that way!) guide the arriving police. The 黑猫警长 leaps into action, using his flying saucer to confront the mantises. The calm voice continues to observe, noting "一枝儿啃下的玉米" (The corn Yizhi gnawed on) and "是一枝儿的脚印" (It's Yizhi's footprints), suggesting an ongoing investigation amidst rustling and footsteps. The scene concludes with the 黑猫警长 standing sternly over the defeated mantises, while the injured "一枝儿" lies on the ground, all under bright, colorful lighting that emphasizes the cartoonish and dynamic nature of the events.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with a brown mouse (棕色老鼠), wearing a yellow vest and blue helmet, running frantically through a green, rocky landscape, emitting distressed whimpering sounds and frantic footsteps before stumbling and falling. A black and white cat in a police uniform, the 黑猫警长, emerges from a hole, observing the mouse's footprints with a stern expression, accompanied by a cat-like sound and a thoughtful "hmm." A smaller cat in a white uniform, the 白制服小猫警员, then crawls out of a hole, looking injured and exhausted, and responds with a "是！" (Yes!) to a gesture from the 黑猫警长. Suspenseful background music begins as the scene transitions to a close-up of a magnifying glass revealing a group of large, yellow grasshoppers (草蜢群), accompanied by a distinct sound effect. The 黑猫警长 then uses a telescope to survey the area, thoughtfully remarking "一只二，真狡猾。" (One-two, really cunning.) as insect buzzing sounds are heard. He then spots green praying mantises (新角色螳螂) with swords attacking the brown mouse in a lush green cornfield (玉米田). The 黑猫警长, identifying the grasshoppers as "蝗虫！一群空中强盗！" (Grasshoppers! A group of aerial bandits!), authoritatively commands "跟我来！" (Follow me!) before boarding a yellow and blue flying saucer-like vehicle (黄色飞行器), which emits a distinct whooshing sound as he flies into the scene. The mantises, led by a large one with a bow tie and white gloves, are shown in combat stances, wielding swords, as their leader, with a commanding voice, declares "弟兄们！一只二大哥交代了，连桌子带螳螂，统统干掉！" (Brothers! Big Brother One-Two has given orders, wipe out both the tables and the mantises!). The scene culminates in aggressive combat with sword clashes, grunts, and shouts as the 黑猫警长 prepares to intervene against the mantises in the vibrant cornfield under a bright blue sky.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens in a vibrant cornfield, where a brown mouse with a white stripe on its head, wearing a yellow vest and blue helmet, runs frantically amidst rustling leaves, emitting distressed squeaks. Suddenly, a green praying mantis with large eyes, a bow tie, and white gloves appears, wielding a sword and attacking the mouse with sharp sword sounds. The mantis strikes, and the mouse falls to the ground, defeated and silent. A voice exclaims "小心!" (Be careful!), followed by an exchange of "谢谢!" (Thank you!) and "不客气!" (You're welcome!). Multiple mantises, all armed with swords, then swarm the area, attacking the motionless mouse. With a whooshing sound, the mantises take to the air, flying in formation with their transparent wings. The camera pans up to a clear blue sky as a black and white cat in a police uniform, identified as 黑猫警长, appears, holding a blue device with an antenna. A commanding voice, belonging to 黑猫警长, shouts "快住手!" (Stop it!) as he switches to a large, futuristic-looking gun. The gun charges and fires, unleashing a barrage of arrows that strike the flying mantises, causing them to explode in bursts of red and orange flames with loud impact sounds. The mantises fall from the sky, disintegrating in mid-air. 黑猫警长, looking determined, then gives an order: "停止射击! 快用H5型远程火箭!" (Cease fire! Quickly use the H5 long-range rocket!) as he rides a humming yellow and blue flying saucer-like vehicle, continuing to fire arrows at the remaining mantises. Distressed cries of "救命啊! 快跑啊!" (Help! Run!) are heard amidst the explosions. The final shot shows 黑猫警长 and the green mantis facing each other, the mantis looking surprised and defeated, while 黑猫警长 stands tall and authoritative. A voice reports, "报告警长，强盗已经全部都被消灭了，谢谢您!" (Reporting, Chief, all the bandits have been eliminated. Thank you!), confirming the success of the operation.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a close-up of a large green leaf in a vibrant cornfield, where a brown mouse with a white stripe on its head, wearing a yellow vest and blue helmet, is seen running frantically. Suddenly, a green praying mantis with large eyes, a bow tie, and white gloves appears, wielding a sword and attacking the mouse. The mantis strikes the mouse, who falls to the ground, defeated. The scene shifts to show multiple mantises, all armed with swords, swarming the area and attacking the mouse, who is now lying motionless. The mantises then take to the air, flying in formation with their transparent wings, as the camera pans up to reveal a clear blue sky. A black and white cat in a police uniform with a red cape, white gloves, and a cap with a yellow insignia—identified as 黑猫警长—appears, holding a blue device with an antenna. He then switches to a large, futuristic-looking gun and fires it, unleashing a barrage of arrows that strike the flying mantises, causing them to explode in bursts of red and orange flames. The mantises are shown falling from the sky, disintegrating in mid-air. The scene cuts to a close-up of the 黑猫警长, who looks determined, as he rides a yellow and blue flying saucer-like vehicle, firing arrows at the remaining mantises. The final shot shows the 黑猫警长 and the green mantis facing each other, the mantis looking surprised and defeated, while the 黑猫警长 stands tall and authoritative, having successfully repelled the attack.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a close-up of the confident 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform, smiling against a clear blue sky. Simultaneously, a voice exclaims in Chinese, 'The locust's corpse is the best flying powder!' followed by cheers and repeated farewells. The scene quickly shifts to a wide shot of a grassy hill where a group of green praying mantises, including the 新角色螳螂, are standing in a line, waving their arms in unison. As the setting transitions to a dark blue night sky, a gentle, melodic acoustic guitar tune begins, accompanying the 新角色螳螂 who is joyfully playing a small yellow guitar while perched on a crescent moon, singing a soft, lyrical Chinese song. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a green female mantis with large blue eyes and a black bow tie, who appears to be singing or reacting emotionally, her eyes closed and ands clasped, seemingly enchanted by his performance. The scene alternates between the male mantis's singing and guitar playing on the moon and the female mantis’s expressive reactions, creating a romantic and musical atmosphere. A group of small, cheerful insects—bees and a dragonfly—fly around flowers, seemingly captivated by the music. The male mantis continues his song, now standing on a grassy hill under the night sky, with the female mantis joining him, her eyes wide with delight. The final frames show the insects dancing and celebrating around the mantises, with the dragonfly and bees flying joyfully, all harmonizing under the stars to the continuing guitar melody and singing.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a whimsical nighttime scene under a deep blue, star-dotted sky, where a green praying mantis, identified as 新角色螳螂, joyfully plays a yellow acoustic guitar on a grassy hill. The melancholic yet hopeful acoustic guitar melody heard throughout the segment emanates from his instrument as he strums, waves his arms, and dances with a content expression. A close-up reveals a large blue insect, possibly a beetle, listening intently to the music. The enchanting melody seems to bring the environment to life, as a group of small, cheerful bees (小蜜蜂群) and a tiny dragonfly (小蜻蜓) fly around, some bees holding glowing lanterns and others dancing near flowers. The mantis then stands on a hill, waving to the sky, and the camera pans to a tall, futuristic tower. Inside a window, the mantis and a female green mantis (绿色雌性螳螂) are seen silhouetted, holding hands and dancing against a warm orange backdrop, suggesting a romantic moment, all set to the continuous guitar tune. The scene briefly shifts to a kitchen where a brown mouse (棕色老鼠), with a bandage on his head and wearing a yellow vest, drools longingly at a golden birthday cake ('生日快乐') before frantically running with a '待办' folder. The video cuts back to the magical night scene, where a bee plays a violin, and the insects continue their joyful celebration among flowers, with the mantis and his companion still dancing in silhouette, all underscored by the evocative acoustic guitar.

He is dressed in a red-and-white striped shirt, black pants, and white gloves, exuding a cheerful demeanor. As he strums, he waves his arms and dances, and the camera zooms in on his face, showing his content expression. The scene transitions to a close-up of a large blue insect with big eyes and antennae, possibly a beetle or another mantis, who appears to be listening intently. The music seems to enchant the environment, as a group of small, cheerful bees (小蜜蜂群) and a tiny dragonfly (小蜻蜓) fly around, some holding glowing lanterns and others dancing near flowers. The scene shifts to a kitchen where a brown mouse (棕色老鼠), now with a white bandage on his head and wearing a yellow vest, looks longingly at a golden cake with orange icing and the Chinese characters '生日快乐' (Happy Birthday) written on top. He drools, then runs frantically with a green folder labeled '待办' (To Do) in red, as if trying to escape or deliver something urgent. The video cuts back to the night scene, where a bee plays a violin, and the insects continue their joyful celebration among flowers, with the mantis and his companion still dancing in silhouette, creating a magical, dreamlike atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a vibrant night scene in a lush garden, where cheerful insects—bees, a dragonfly, and a caterpillar—dance and play among colorful flowers under a deep blue sky, accompanied by gentle, somewhat mysterious background music. A female narrator's voice states, '夜深了，黑猫警长还在研究案情' (It's late at night, Black Cat Detective is still studying the case). The scene then shifts to an indoor office setting, where the 黑猫警长, a black and white cat in a police uniform, is seated at a desk, reviewing documents and writing notes with a red pen, his expression focused and determined, with sounds of writing and paper shuffling. The setting changes again to an outdoor area near a building labeled '森林公安局' (Forest Public Security Bureau), where a white-uniformed cat officer, the 白制服小猫警员, is seen crawling on the ground, holding a camera and magnifying glass, examining footprints and debris on a yellow background. He exclaims, '班长，这里发现一只耳的脚印！' (Squad leader, footprints of One-Eared Mouse have been found here!) and then questions a newly discovered small, green praying mantis, the 新角色螳螂, asking, '螳螂姑娘，你看到一只耳来过吗？' (Miss Mantis, have you seen One-Eared Mouse here?). The surprised mantis, gesturing with his hands, replies, '我...我...我没有见到过' (I... I... I haven't seen him). The officer further inquires, '那么，有其他可疑的迹象吗？' (Then, are there any other suspicious signs?), to which the mantis responds, '这...也没有' (This... also no). The scene cuts to a close-up of the 黑猫警长, who is now observing the evidence on a screen, his expression shifting from thoughtful to confident as he points at the screen, indicating a breakthrough. A narrator's voice concludes, '经过鉴定，蛋糕屑上提取的唾液DNA和一只耳的完全吻合。所有的证据都指向一只耳，但细心的黑猫警长还是发现了一...' (After identification, the saliva DNA extracted from the cake crumbs completely matches One-Eared Mouse. All evidence points to One-Eared Mouse, but the careful Black Cat Detective still found a...) as the minute ends.
